39.reason: [Error: The second parameter of the Single constructor for ">=" should be ">=", but it is incorrectly set to "==". This will cause the token ">=" to be incorrectly recognized as "==" with type "EQL" instead of "GEQ".]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 1.0 , reason:  [Error: The second parameter of the Single constructor for ">=" should be ">=", but it is incorrectly set to "==". This will cause the token ">=" to be incorrectly recognized as "==" with type "EQL" instead of "GEQ".]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 1.0 , reason:  Error: The second argument should be "GEQ" instead of "EQL". This causes the token ">=" to be incorrectly mapped to the category code "EQL" (which is for "==") instead of "GEQ".
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 1.0 , reason:  Error: The key is ">=" but the value's name is incorrectly set to "==" and type to "EQL". It should be new Single(">=", "GEQ").
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 1.0 , reason:  Error: The token code for ">=" should be "GEQ", and the string value is ">=", not "==". This will cause the lexer to misidentify ">=" as "EQL" (==) and also output the wrong string representation.
